_meta.description: P2-060 — Curated hidden-gem POIs per major Indian highway corridor. Coords are approximate (good enough for the carousel + corridor matching, since the user opens each in Maps to navigate). Tags must match HiddenGemTag enum wireValues.

gems.name: Mahalaxmi Sweets, Lonavla
gems.description: Original chikki since 1908 — buy a tray for the family, queue moves fast.

gems.name: Rajmachi Viewpoint
gems.description: Tiny pull-off above the Khopoli descent — sweeping Sahyadri valley views.

gems.name: German Bakery, Koregaon Park
gems.description: Pune institution — apple strudel and good coffee right at trip-end.

gems.name: Prem Mandir, Vrindavan
gems.description: Marble temple complex — late evenings the fountain show is genuinely lovely.

gems.name: Panchhi Petha, Agra
gems.description: Original Panchhi outlet — the kesar and chocolate petha are the picks.

gems.name: Maddur Tiffanys, Maddur
gems.description: Maddur vade and filter coffee — the South Indian breakfast detour worth taking.

gems.name: Ranganathittu Bird Sanctuary
gems.description: Cauvery backwaters with painted storks and crocodiles — quiet morning boat ride.

gems.name: Hotel Mylari Dosa, Mysuru
gems.description: Buttery Mysuru-style dosa, no menu, no fuss. Carry cash.

gems.name: Ellora Caves
gems.description: UNESCO rock-cut wonder. Easy 20 km detour off the Aurangabad belt.

gems.name: Bhakti Sagar Kachori, Shegaon
gems.description: Famous khalbat kachori — locals time their fuel stop here for a reason.
